ui.createAdminHint: Fill in account and approval information. A new admin user ID is returned after creation.
ui.passwordRules: At least 12 chars with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special char
ui.auditHint: Filter logs by actor, action, category, severity, and result for operations traceability and security auditing.
ui.actorFuzzyHint: The actor does not exactly match a user. The system will continue filtering by username or user ID containment.
ui.auditScrollHint: The table supports horizontal scrolling to view all columns.
ui.auditEmpty: No audit data matched. Try clearing one or more filters.
ui.modelConfigHint: Priority: user model settings, then this global config, then backend .env. Rebuild indexes after embedding model changes to avoid vector dimension mismatch.
ui.anthropicEmbeddingHint: Anthropic has no embedding model. Leave empty to use .env
ui.keyEchoDesc: Masked only, plaintext is never returned
ui.privateUrlDesc: Blocked by default; local Ollama is allowed
ui.personalSettingsDesc: User-saved model config takes priority over global config
ui.usersHint: Filter by user ID / username and directly perform role, status, and security actions.
ui.userSearchPlaceholder: Search username / user ID / classification fields
ui.systemLogHint: Shows application runtime logs, including error stack traces, for system health and exception review.
ui.slowRequestsHint: Shows high-latency API requests in the current time window for performance troubleshooting. Time is server-recorded and duration is in ms.
ui.ragOpsHint: Manage retrieval strategies, canary release, and benchmark trends. Defaults follow RAGFlow baseline / advanced / safe.
ui.noTrend: No trend data yet. Click Run benchmark to record automatically.
ui.filterHelp: Filter help: actor supports user ID or username; action keyword filters action names. Leave both empty to view all.
ui.diagnosticsHint: Troubleshoots backend process, environment, and connection interruption issues by showing interpreter, Conda environment, model config, and recent errors.

landing.heroSubtitle: Enterprise-grade, local-first intelligent Q&A engine with multi-agent orchestration, hybrid retrieval, graph enhancement, and streaming chat.
landing.featuresSubtitle: A look at the production-ready components that power our enterprise intelligent search engine.
landing.feature1Desc: Built on LangGraph. Intelligently routes queries across Router, Vector RAG, Graph RAG, Web Research, and Synthesis agents for precise answers.
landing.feature2Desc: Blends dense vector search (ChromaDB) and sparse BM25 retrieval using Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF), followed by BGE-reranker cross-encoding.
landing.feature3Desc: Queries Neo4j knowledge graphs to match entities and retrieve multi-hop relationships, unlocking deep relational reasoning and context.
landing.feature4Desc: True streaming PDF processing with 70% memory reduction, OCR (Tesseract) for scanned documents, and parallel chart/image captioning.
landing.feature5Desc: Controls query profiles (Fast/Balanced/Deep), Canary routing for A/B testing, prompt version control/rollback, and query replay.
landing.feature6Desc: RBAC permissions, audit logging, constant-time token comparison, rate limiting, and strictly isolated user-scoped session databases.
landing.workflowSubtitle: How queries are processed securely, analyzed, routed, retrieved, and synthesized.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to Unlock Your Local Knowledge?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Deploy a secure, powerful, and private multi-agent copilot in minutes.

login.headline:
QueryMind
Platform
login.passwordHint: 12+ chars with uppercase, lowercase, number and special char
login.githubUnavailable: GitHub OAuth will be enabled after configuration
login.googleUnavailable: Google OAuth will be enabled after configuration (see GOOGLE_OAUTH_SETUP.md)

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your username or email and we will send a secure reset email to help you restore access.
tips: Each reset link can only be used once
The system will not reveal whether the account exists
forgotPassword.formSubtitle: Enter the username or email address used at registration
forgotPassword.identifierHint: Enter the username or email used during registration
forgotPassword.identifierReady: Information is filled in and ready to send
forgotPassword.success: If the account exists, we have sent a password reset link to the email address.
forgotPassword.failed: Request failed. Please try again later.
forgotPassword.sentDescription: If the account exists, we have sent a reset link to the matching email address. Continue verification from the email.
nextSteps: Open your inbox or spam folder
Click the password reset link in the email
Sign in again with the new password
forgotPassword.notReceivedText: You can resend the email or contact an administrator for help.
forgotPassword.resendText: If the email address was mistyped or delivery is delayed, submit another recovery request.
forgotPassword.contactText: If you still cannot recover the account, ask an administrator to confirm account status or reset credentials manually.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.description: To protect your account, update your password regularly and make sure the new password differs from the old one.
changePassword.formSubtitle: After update, future sign-ins will use the new password credential.
changePassword.currentHint: Enter current password to verify identity
changePassword.newHint: Set a new password that meets the requirements
changePassword.samePassword: New password cannot be the same as old password

profile.title: Profile
profile.displayNameHint: This name will be shown throughout the system

admin.subtitle: Enterprise management workspace
admin.noPermission: The current account does not have administrator permissions.

keyboard.footer: Press Esc or click outside to close

apiSettings.title: Model API Settings
apiSettings.subtitle: Chat provider, key, model, and generation params
apiSettings.saveSuccess: Settings saved. New queries will use this model config.
apiSettings.connectionFailed: Connection failed, check Base URL / API Key / Model
apiSettings.note: These settings apply to chat and reasoning calls. Embeddings are configured globally by an admin so the vector index stays consistent.
apiSettings.adminOnlyDetails: Model configuration is restricted to administrators. Please contact your system admin to modify model settings.

chat.sidebarDescription: Multi-agent knowledge base and retrieval workspace
chat.welcomeSubtitle: Evidence-based intelligent Q&A engine with multimodal document processing, knowledge graph retrieval, and web research.
chat.smartRetrievalDesc: Vector, graph, and BM25 hybrid retrieval with multi-strategy fusion.
chat.webResearchDesc: Real-time web search for fresh information and external knowledge.
chat.multimodalDesc: Supports PDFs, images, batch chart extraction, and streaming loading.
chat.evidenceTraceDesc: Shows routing decisions, retrieval sources, and reasoning process.
chat.tipUpload: Drag files into the composer or sidebar to upload quickly
chat.tipAgent: Choose different Agent modes for the best answer
chat.composerLabel: Enter a question, or drag / paste documents here
chat.composerPlaceholder: Example: Summarize the security risks in the latest uploaded PDF and cite evidence...
chat.webSearchTitle: Search the internet for latest information when enabled
chat.reasoningTitle: Use deep reasoning mode when enabled

modeHint.local: Local fast mode with {{strategy}} retrieval: suitable for low-latency Q&A and indexed document analysis.
modeHint.web: Web-enhanced mode with {{strategy}} retrieval: suitable for questions that need fresh information; responses may be slower.
modeHint.reasoning: Reasoning mode with {{strategy}} retrieval: suitable for complex analysis, audits, and multi-step synthesis.

coreMethods: Hybrid Retrieval: Vector + BM25 + RRF + Rerank (BGE-reranker-v2-m3)
Graph Retrieval: Entity matching + neighbor relations + APOC plugin
Multi-Agent Orchestration: LangGraph workflow + conditional routing
ReAct Agent: Reasoning + Acting pattern with iterative tool use (max 5 Think-Act-Observe cycles)
Tiered Execution: Fast/Balanced/Deep modes + load degradation
Parent-Child Chunking: Balance precision and context (parent 1500 / child 600 tokens)
Query Rewrite: Dedup optimization reduces 10-30% redundant LLM calls
Chinese NLP: Tokenization + synonym expansion + query preprocessing
Advanced RAG: Query decomposition + Self-RAG evaluation
Streaming Generation: SSE chunk return + heartbeat keepalive
Streaming PDF: True streaming + 70% memory optimization
Batch Chart Extraction: Parallel processing + throughput optimization
Image Captioning: AI-driven visual content description
Prompt Management: Version control + approval workflow + rollback
Performance Comparison: Baseline system + comprehensive evaluation metrics
Agent Visualization: Real-time tracking + SSE streaming updates
CI/CD Quality Gate: Automated RAG evaluation + performance benchmarking
database: SQLite: Users, sessions, audit logs, prompt versions, encrypted API settings
File System: Document uploads (uploads/user_*/) + OCR cache
Memory Cache: Retrieval config + runtime state
security: Password Policy: PBKDF2 hash + salt + 12-128 chars + special char requirements
JWT Auth: Bearer token + HttpOnly Cookie + expiration
Approval Tokens: Single-use + constant-time comparison against timing attacks
Rate Limiting: Admin ops 1-5 req/hour + query quotas
Input Validation: Security checks + dangerous command blocking + SQL injection protection
Session Isolation: User-isolated upload dirs, session files, document access
API Key Encryption: AES encrypted storage + URL whitelist validation
Audit Logging: Full recording of sensitive ops + failure tracking
Circuit Breaker: Fault isolation + bulkhead pattern + retry logic
modelBackends: Ollama: Local deployment (qwen2.5, llama3, deepseek, etc.)
Hybrid Deployment: Local inference + cloud embeddings
Runtime Switching: Dynamic config without restart
operations: Canary Routing: Gradual rollout + A/B testing
Config Rollback: One-click restore to previous version
Query Replay: Historical query re-execution for validation
Load Degradation: Auto-downgrade under high load (>80%)
Prompt Versioning: Track changes + approval flow
Automated Evaluation: RAGAS metrics + regression testing
frontend: Vite 6.4: Fast build + HMR hot reload
Code Splitting: On-demand loading + lazy load optimization
Modern CSS Architecture: Modular + theme system
SSE Streaming Rendering: Real-time message stream display

architecture.apiEndpoints:
# Authentication & Users
POST /auth/register
POST /auth/login
POST /auth/logout
POST /auth/refresh
GET  /auth/me

# Query & Sessions
POST /query
POST /query/stream
GET  /sessions
POST /sessions
DELETE /sessions/{id}
PATCH /sessions/{id}/strategy
PATCH /sessions/{id}/messages/{message_id}
GET  /sessions/{id}/memory
POST /sessions/{id}/memory/clear

# Document Management
GET  /documents
DELETE /documents/{doc_id}
POST /documents/reindex
POST /upload

# Prompt Management
GET  /prompts
POST /prompts
PUT  /prompts/{id}
POST /prompts/check
POST /prompts/{id}/approve
POST /prompts/{id}/rollback

# Admin - User Management
GET  /admin/users
POST /admin/users
PATCH /admin/users/{user_id}/role
PATCH /admin/users/{user_id}/status
DELETE /admin/users/{user_id}

# Admin - Operations
GET  /admin/ops/profiles
POST /admin/ops/profiles
POST /admin/ops/canary
POST /admin/ops/rollback
POST /admin/ops/benchmark
POST /admin/ops/replay
GET  /admin/ops/report

# Admin - Model Config
GET  /admin/model-settings
PUT  /admin/model-settings

# User - API Settings
GET  /user/api-settings
PUT  /user/api-settings

# Evaluation & Tracking
POST /api/evaluation/compare
GET  /api/evaluation/baselines
GET  /agent-tracking/trace/{id}
GET  /agent-tracking/stream/{id}
GET  /agent-tracking/history

# Advanced RAG
POST /api/advanced-rag/decompose
POST /api/advanced-rag/self-rag

# Health Checks
GET  /health
GET  /ready
GET  /metrics
